title: Mocha’s Stand
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Children. The central beat is mocha’s stand.
scene: The scene focuses on mocha’s stand, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Children shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The fight in the Biscuit room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The gas is coming in...!! Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But the exit isn't over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ST...Stop it!! This is worth- Fying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was just a bit light- headed.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What a sword- maniac you are !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stay still now, here's a sedative!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If I can just keep this up...

summary: Mocha’s Stand. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
